basic note callout
.
> [!note]
> This is a note callout
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="note">
<div class="callout-title">Note</div>
<p>This is a note callout</p>
</div>
.

callout with explicit title
.
> [!warning] Be careful!
> Content here
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="warning">
<div class="callout-title">Be careful!</div>
<p>Content here</p>
</div>
.

foldable open callout
.
> [!tip]+ Expand me
> Hidden content
.
<details class="callout" data-callout="tip" open>
<summary class="callout-title">Expand me</summary>
<p>Hidden content</p>
</details>
.

foldable closed callout
.
> [!danger]- Collapse me
> Hidden content
.
<details class="callout" data-callout="danger">
<summary class="callout-title">Collapse me</summary>
<p>Hidden content</p>
</details>
.

unknown type stays blockquote
.
> [!unknown]
> Should be blockquote
.
<blockquote>
<p>[!unknown]
Should be blockquote</p>
</blockquote>
.

regular blockquote unaffected
.
> Just a quote
.
<blockquote>
<p>Just a quote</p>
</blockquote>
.

tldr default title
.
> [!tldr]
> Summary text
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="tldr">
<div class="callout-title">TL;DR</div>
<p>Summary text</p>
</div>
.

faq default title
.
> [!faq]
> Question text
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="faq">
<div class="callout-title">FAQ</div>
<p>Question text</p>
</div>
.

multi-paragraph callout
.
> [!note] Title
> First paragraph
>
> Second paragraph
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="note">
<div class="callout-title">Title</div>
<p>First paragraph</p>
<p>Second paragraph</p>
</div>
.

callout with inline formatting
.
> [!tip] Important
> **Bold** and *italic* text
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="tip">
<div class="callout-title">Important</div>
<p><strong>Bold</strong> and <em>italic</em> text</p>
</div>
.

callout with list inside
.
> [!note] Checklist
> - item 1
> - item 2
> - item 3
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="note">
<div class="callout-title">Checklist</div>
<ul>
<li>item 1</li>
<li>item 2</li>
<li>item 3</li>
</ul>
</div>
.

all known types - note
.
> [!note]
> Content
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="note">
<div class="callout-title">Note</div>
<p>Content</p>
</div>
.

all known types - warning
.
> [!warning]
> Content
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="warning">
<div class="callout-title">Warning</div>
<p>Content</p>
</div>
.

all known types - bug
.
> [!bug]
> Content
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="bug">
<div class="callout-title">Bug</div>
<p>Content</p>
</div>
.

all known types - example
.
> [!example]
> Content
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="example">
<div class="callout-title">Example</div>
<p>Content</p>
</div>
.

callout followed by content
.
> [!note] Title
> Inside callout

Outside paragraph
.
<div class="callout" data-callout="note">
<div class="callout-title">Title</div>
<p>Inside callout</p>
</div>
<p>Outside paragraph</p>
.

foldable open with default title
.
> [!info]+
> Content
.
<details class="callout" data-callout="info" open>
<summary class="callout-title">Info</summary>
<p>Content</p>
</details>
.

foldable closed with default title
.
> [!error]-
> Content
.
<details class="callout" data-callout="error">
<summary class="callout-title">Error</summary>
<p>Content</p>
</details>
.
